title: Oportun Financial Corp (OPRT) Reports 7% YoY Revenue Growth in Q3 2023
text: Oportun Financial Corp reported a 7% year-over-year increase in revenue to $268 million for Q3 2023. Profitability improved significantly with a net loss of $21 million, an improvement from the $106 million loss reported in Q3 2022. The diluted earnings per share (EPS) stood at $(0.55), compared to $(3.21) in the same period last year. Operating expenses also declined significantly, reaching the lowest in two years at $123 million. The company's Adjusted EBITDA was $16 million, up from a $6.2 million loss in Q3 2022. Membership grew by 13% YoY to 2.1 million, and products increased by 14% YoY to 2.3 million. Aggregate originations were down by 24% compared to the prior-year quarter, standing at $483 million, reflecting the company's credit tightening actions during the period.
